creator: rnordier@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

This is evidently being caused by the keyboard probe failing to find 
your keyboard.  Is this a standard keyboard with 12 function keys and 
two sets of Ctrl and Alt keys? 

The suggested workaround is to build a boot floppy with no /boot.config 
file, if possible.  Alternatively, mount the boot floppy and delete the 
file.  An actual fix should be available once we've considered the 
alternatives.
